title: Duplicate inboxes
creator: hatowl
content: Hi, bit of a strange ome. I have 4 email account in Thunderbird. One is my AOL account and one is my wifes AOL account. This morning my emails suddenly started appearing in both my AOL account and my wifes AOL account while her emails don't appar at all. I've deleteing her account and setting it up again but the same thing happpens. I'm at a loss. Can you help?

title: Disable attachment preview popup
creator: Mark_Saunders
content: I am looking for a way to disable the attachment preview pop-up for incoming emails. Almost all attachments I receive are PDFs and it doesn't work with them, only showing a black screen. Further, the popups cause my auto-hide taskbar to keep unhiding and getting in the way of my work.

title: could you please change the translation on the german client of thunderbird asking for "the password" in the setup of an emailaccount but meant is the password from the emailprovider to give thirdpartyapps access
creator: eridanus
content: hello, i had a friend and his father needed urgently to migrate his thunderbird with 1 email to a new computer but he wasnt able to setup the emailaccount in a new german client. i helped and the problem was that the setup asks for the password but it meant the password from the emailprovider to allow thirdpartyapps access. please consider to improve the german setup wizard by adding a new textline to clearify. best regards
